prompt: Create a realistic tabletop photo of a decorated instant-film cheki card featuring an anime-style portrait of Stella. The card is a vertical white Polaroid/Instax frame with rounded corners, lying slightly angled on a cozy desk surface over lined notebook paper and cream lace fabric. Inside the photo window, show a refined young anime girl with long black hair, seated at a café table in a softly lit vintage interior; she wears a frilly white blouse with puff sleeves, black ribbons, a dark choker with a pale blue flower detail, dangling earrings, and a dark skirt or suspenders, resting one cheek on her gloved hand with her other arm folded on the wooden table. Keep the face area softly obscured or anonymized by a subtle square blur while preserving the outfit, hair, pose, and atmosphere. The cheki border is heavily hand-decorated in blue and black ink with exactly 21 distinct doodle elements: 3 bows (large top-left bow, small left-side bow, large bottom-right bow), 1 constellation on the left edge, 1 crescent moon with clouds at lower left, 1 jeweled choker/collar illustration at bottom center-left, 1 handwritten name label reading Stella near the bottom, 3 star clusters/sparkle groups (top-right, right edge, bottom center), 2 shooting-star or wand-like motifs on the right, 2 heart doodles at lower right, 2 diamond/gem doodles on the lower right edge, 1 row of small dots at top center, 1 row of small dots at bottom left, 1 loose ribbon-string doodle on the right, 1 cloud-like outline across the top border, and 1 tiny star charm effect overlapping the upper-right corner of the inner photo. Use blue ballpoint pen and black fine liner strokes, slightly imperfect hand-drawn lines, scattered small dots and sparkles, and a faint glittery sheen on the photo. Background props include exactly 5 visible surrounding items: lined notebook paper on the left, cream lace cloth underneath, a small metallic star charm at bottom left, a strip of dark navy ribbon at bottom right, and a warm wooden surface edge. Lighting is warm, natural, and softly nostalgic, with shallow depth of field, realistic paper texture, mild shadows, and a handmade scrapbook aesthetic. No extra printed captions besides the handwritten name.
